mapper.select: SELECT s.total_point + COALESCE(SUM(MY_VALUE.value), 0) FROM students s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT o.student_id, SUM(CASE WHEN o.content = '매수' THEN o.amount ELSE -o.amount END) * COALESCE( (SELECT price FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state = '체결' ORDER BY order_date DESC LIMIT 1), st.publication_price ) AS value FROM orders o JOIN stocks st ON o.stock_no = st.stock_no WHERE o.state = '체결' GROUP BY o.student_id, o.stock_no, st.publication_price ) MY_VALUE ON s.student_id = MY_VALUE.student_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY s.total_point

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(stock_profit), 0) AS totalProfit FROM ( SELECT ( SUM(CASE WHEN o.content = '매수' THEN o.amount ELSE -o.amount END) * COALESCE( ( SELECT price FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockId} AND state = '체결' ORDER BY order_date DESC LIMIT 1 ), st.publication_price ) ) - SUM(CASE WHEN o.content = '매수' THEN o.price * o.amount ELSE 0 END) AS stock_profit FROM orders o JOIN stocks st ON o.stock_no = st.stock_no WHERE o.student_id = #{studentId} AND o.state = #{state} GROUP BY o.stock_no, st.publication_price )
